div.p: Testing all combinations of alignment offset and string length
Legend: ✓ = Test passes This matrix tests all 16×16 combinations of:

ul.li: Alignment offset (0-15): Starting position within 16-byte aligned block
String length (0-16): Number of bytes before null terminator Critical boundary cases:
len=15: One byte below SSE vector width
len=16: Exact SSE vector width (one full chunk) Alignment edge cases:
